response: This medium-difficulty Thai Pad Thai recipe requires just 15 minutes of preparation and 10 minutes of cooking time, yielding four full servings. Each serving contains 380 calories, with a clear macronutrient breakdown of 22 grams of protein, 45 grams of carbohydrates, and 12 grams of fat, making it an approachable, substantial take on the beloved classic Asian noodle dish.
